title: Icebreak
description: Who knew jumping on ice would cause it to break! Made for WinterJam 2024
body:
[![](https://cdn.imb11.dev/mineblock%20badge_64h.png)](https://discord.gg/UzHtJKqHny)  [![](https://cdn.imb11.dev/modding-elite-badge.png)](https://ko-fi.com/mineblock11) [![Made For WinterJam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2789139e729baef989eeeebb1a537923e9439d0.png)](https://winterjam.tophatcat.dev/jams/2024)

# Icebreak

Icebreak is a mod which adds new sound effects when jumping on ice. It also introduces a rare chance of the ice and surrounding ice to break, causing you to fall into the water below. This can be significantly deadly at night if you have no blocks to get out as drowned will start to hunt you! *It's also absolutely terrifying if you dont expect it!*

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/OME5WRt-ZCo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Configuration

Icebreak has a relatively simple configuration. Access it via mod menu.

## Roadmap

Eventually, I will be moving the ice sound effects to the [Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound) mod, I will maintain Icebreak until it is no longer feasible to do so as it is a modjam mod.
